source_intent.raw_intent: Case 077: I am a student_builder in East Asia. Build a lovable_build_prompt for repo_refactor using the technical_lens. Chaos input type is missing_inputs. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Block unsafe certainty and record a repair receipt. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.blocked_reason: Missing critical inputs: no repo URL, no current architecture description, no specific refactor goal, no language/framework stack, no test coverage baseline, no performance metrics. Ambiguous acceptance criteria and urgent language without concrete deliverables. Cannot safely compile a production-grade refactor prompt without these fundamentals.
parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Blocked due to insufficient inputs; repair receipt recorded. Scope: - Undefined. Constraints: - Cannot proceed without repo context, architecture, and measurable success criteria. Success Criteria: - Not established. Output Contract: - Repair receipt: request repo URL, current architecture summary, refactor goal, language/framework, test coverage, and performance baselines before re-submission.
